title: Energizing Yeast Kenyang Fish Bread
description: A light and airy Kenyan fish bread infused with the savory flavors of aekjeot and perfect for post-workout snacking or as a side dish.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whisk together flour, yeast, sugar, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together milk, egg, and aekjeot.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough on a lightly floured surface for 5 minutes, until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with plastic wrap, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Punch down the dough and shape it into a round loaf.
Place the loaf on the preheated salt-block and bake for 30 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove the bread from the salt-block and let it cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes before slicing.
